title: Mission statement for my petitionsite.com. Check it out!

transcript.text: Hey, what's up? This video is a mission statement for PetitionSite.com. It's also to tell people
About PetitionSite.com and also my first petition on PetitionSite.com. It's like trifecta video.

Could call it a social networking site. Um, it's like a mega site. It's really cool. You
Know, you can make friends and stuff with it, like MySpace and Facebook and stuff. And you

A video introduction video of yourself attached on your profile. Um, but it's like people who
Are dedicated to, it's all revolving around trying to, um, make the world a better place
By getting each other involved in different causes and stuff. And like the way I found
Out about that was I just became a member of the PetitionSite.com like three years ago

Can attach a letter on it. And if you're too busy to attach a letter from yourself, you
Just, you just copy and you just attach the letter that the person writes for you who makes
The petition. Then you just put your name on the bottom of it and then you sign it. And
Then people have like goals of how many petitions you want, they get, they want people to say.
Then once they hit their goal, you, they send that petition off to whoever they want to send
It to. Right. So it's like, yes, I, I ask you government to do this, that, or anybody, you know,
And then look, look at all the petitions I have signed and then, and like people comment and stuff.

Site though, the petitions that I am going to sign, cause I only have enough time to sign a certain
